recipe.title: Potato, pepper & broccoli frittata
recipe.description: Brilliantly simple, this veg-packed frittata makes a great midweek meal for the whole family.

steps.descr: Drizzle 1 tablespoon of olive oil into a 28cm ovenproof...
steps.instructions: Drizzle 1 tablespoon of olive oil into a 28cm ovenproof non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat.

on_enter.say: Drizzle 1 tablespoon of olive oil into a 28cm ovenproof non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat.

steps.descr: Scrub 600g of potatoes and chop into 1cm dice, adding to...
steps.instructions: Scrub 600g of potatoes and chop into 1cm dice, adding to the pan as you go.

on_enter.say: Scrub 600g of potatoes and chop into 1cm dice, adding to the pan as you go.

steps.descr: Trim, finely slice and add 1 bunch of spring onions
steps.instructions: Trim, finely slice and add 1 bunch of spring onions. Trim the tough end off 1 head of broccoli (375g), finely chop the remaining stalk and add to the pan. Deseed, finely slice and add 1 red pepper.

on_enter.say: Trim, finely slice and add 1 bunch of spring onions. Trim the tough end off 1 head of broccoli (375g), finely chop the remaining stalk and add to the pan. Deseed, finely slice and add 1 red pepper.

steps.descr: Season with a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, add 1...
steps.instructions: Season with a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, add 1 teaspoon of smoked paprika, then cook for 15 minutes, or until golden, stirring occasionally. Slice the head of broccoli apart into bite-sized florets, adding to the pan for the last 5 minutes.

on_enter.say: Season with a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, add 1 teaspoon of smoked paprika, then cook for 15 minutes, or until golden, stirring occasionally. Slice the head of broccoli apart into bite-sized florets, adding to the pan for the last 5 minutes.

steps.descr: Crack 8 large eggs into a bowl and beat together, grate...
steps.instructions: Crack 8 large eggs into a bowl and beat together, grate in 30g of Cheddar cheese and season with salt and pepper. Mix together well.

on_enter.say: Crack 8 large eggs into a bowl and beat together, grate in 30g of Cheddar cheese and season with salt and pepper. Mix together well.

steps.descr: Roughly chop half the watercress, spinach & rocket (40g)...
steps.instructions: Roughly chop half the watercress, spinach & rocket (40g) and stir into the pan, then pour over the egg mixture, swirling to coat the base of the pan.

on_enter.say: Roughly chop half the watercress, spinach & rocket (40g) and stir into the pan, then pour over the egg mixture, swirling to coat the base of the pan.

steps.descr: Grate over the remaining 10g of Cheddar and cook for 2...
steps.instructions: Grate over the remaining 10g of Cheddar and cook for 2 minutes, then bake for 10 minutes, or until golden and set.

on_enter.say: Grate over the remaining 10g of Cheddar and cook for 2 minutes, then bake for 10 minutes, or until golden and set.

steps.descr: Slide the frittata out onto a serving board and cut into...
steps.instructions: Slide the frittata out onto a serving board and cut into wedges. Dress the remaining watercress, spinach & rocket (40g) in 1 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil and serve alongside.

on_enter.say: Slide the frittata out onto a serving board and cut into wedges. Dress the remaining watercress, spinach & rocket (40g) in 1 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil and serve alongside.
